title: General Affidavit
template: I, {{fullName}}, residing at {{address}}, do hereby solemnly affirm and declare that the statements made herein are true and correct to the best of my knowledge and belief.

title: Name Change Affidavit
template: I, {{oldName}}, have changed my name to {{newName}} and shall hereafter be known as {{newName}} for all legal purposes.

title: Address Proof Affidavit
template: I, {{fullName}}, certify that my permanent address is {{address}}.

title: Birth Affidavit
template: I hereby affirm that {{personName}} was born on {{dob}} at {{birthPlace}}.

title: Marriage Affidavit
template: I hereby declare that I am legally married to {{spouseName}} on {{marriageDate}}.

title: Divorce Affidavit
template: I hereby declare that my marriage with {{spouseName}} has legally ended on {{divorceDate}}.

title: Income Affidavit
template: I declare that my monthly income is {{income}}.

title: Domicile Affidavit
template: I certify that I am a permanent resident of {{state}}.

title: Nationality Affidavit
template: I declare that I am a citizen of {{country}}.

title: Identity Affidavit
template: I certify that my identity details provided herein are true and correct.

title: Lost Passport Affidavit
template: My passport bearing number {{passportNumber}} was lost on {{lossDate}}.

title: Lost Certificate Affidavit
template: My certificate has been lost and despite every effort could not be recovered.

title: Lost Driving Licence Affidavit
template: My driving licence number {{licenseNumber}} has been lost.

title: Lost SIM Affidavit
template: My SIM card with number {{mobileNumber}} has been lost.

title: Lost Document Affidavit
template: The following document has been lost: {{documentName}}.

title: Rent Agreement
template: This agreement is executed between {{ownerName}} and {{tenantName}}.

title: Lease Agreement
template: This lease agreement is effective from {{startDate}} to {{endDate}}.

title: Sale Agreement
template: The seller {{sellerName}} agrees to sell the property to {{buyerName}}.

title: Gift Deed
template: The donor {{donorName}} gifts the property to {{receiverName}}.

title: Property NOC
template: No objection is hereby granted regarding the property situated at {{propertyAddress}}.

title: Employment Letter
template: This certifies that {{employeeName}} is employed with {{companyName}} as {{designation}}.

title: Experience Letter
template: {{employeeName}} worked with {{companyName}} from {{fromDate}} to {{toDate}}.

title: Salary Certificate
template: {{employeeName}} receives a monthly salary of {{salary}}.

title: Joining Letter
template: You are appointed as {{designation}} with effect from {{joiningDate}}.

title: Resignation Letter
template: I hereby resign from my position effective {{resignationDate}}.

title: No Objection Certificate
template: This is to certify that we have no objection to {{personName}} for {{purpose}}.

title: Character Certificate
template: {{personName}} is known to us and bears good moral character.

title: Bonafide Certificate
template: This certifies that {{studentName}} is a bonafide student of {{institutionName}}.

title: Residence Certificate
template: {{personName}} is residing at {{address}}.

title: Legal Notice
template: This legal notice is issued to {{recipientName}} regarding {{subject}}.
